positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic safari scene. A stylized, silhouetted lion, standing alert, is positioned center-right, looking toward a stylized crescent moon hanging over rolling dunes. Scattered around the lion are minimalist representations of various desert fauna: gazelles leaping, a stylized camel, and a pair of soaring vultures. The overall style is clean, elegant linework combined with solid color blocks and negative space, reminiscent of modern Nordic or Japanese screen printing. Use a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette with crisp black outlines. High contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel, isolated on a clean white background.
